---
title: "Week 4"
subtitle: "Causality II, DAGs, and Uncertainty"
editor: visual
---

::: callout-important
-   Project Draft Due Fri. July 17
:::

## Prepare

📖 Read [Chapter 7 in ModernDive](https://moderndive.com/v2/sampling.html)

📖 Read [Directed Acyclical Graphs in Causal Inference: The Mixtape](https://mixtape.scunning.com/)^[2](https://quantpol.juanftellez.com/content/08-content.html#fn2)^

## Lectures

🖥️ [Lecture 10 -](not-available-lec.html)[Causality II](not-avaliable-lec.html)

🖥️ [Lecture 11 - DAGs](not-avaliable-lec.html)

🖥️ [Lecture 12 - Uncertainty](not-avaliable-lec.html)

## Participation

📋

## Lab

⌨️ [Lab 4 - Causality + DAGs](not-available.html)

<br><br>

::: {style="font-size: 0.875em;"}
Back to [course schedule](/ "Course schedule") ⏎
:::
